# Principal Data Analyst - Commercial Banking job at Citizens Financial Group in Johnston, RI, Shelton, CT, Boston, MA, Westwood, MA
...
Title: Principal Data Analyst- Commercial Banking
...
The Principal Data Analyst – Commercial Banking is a senior, individual‑contributor role supporting Commercial Banking. This role serves as a analytics partner across Commercial Banking with a primary focus on enabling data and analytics that support customer onboarding, customer servicing, and treasury management.
...
This position works closely with teams supporting finance, sales, origination, underwriting, and servicing systems, as well as core banking platforms, to ensure analytics solutions are aligned to Commercial Banking processes, systems, and transformation goals.
...
Partner with Product, Technology, Operations, and Data Engineering teams aligned to Origination systems, Underwriting platforms, Servicing systems, Financial reporting systems, CRM.
...
Translate Commercial Banking business and operational requirements into analytical requirements, metrics, and insights.
...
Deliver full customer life cycle analytics, supporting - Customer onboarding journeys, Ongoing customer servicing, Treasury management capabilities & usage, Customer Profitability & Pricing.
...
Perform complex data analysis across large, multi‑source Commercial Banking datasets.
...
Design and develop analytical datasets, KPIs, and reporting aligned to RTB outcomes.
...
Identify data quality, completeness, and lineage issues; partner with data engineering teams to remediate.
...
Provide analytical input and support for Commercial Banking system modernization efforts.
...
8+ years of experience in data analytics, or advanced analytics roles working with cloud compute infrastructure including AWS and/or Snowflake
...
Experience supporting analytics for customer onboarding, customer servicing, and treasury management.
...
Strong experience with core banking platforms and associated Commercial Banking ecosystems.
...
Advanced SQL & Python programming skills and experience working with large, complex enterprise datasets.
...
Proven ability to translate
...
needs into analytical solutions.
...
Demonstrated experience
...
data & analytics program(s), as well
...
coaching and mentoring junior colleagues.
...
Experience supporting large‑scale transformation or modernization programs.
...
Familiarity with data engineering concepts, data modeling, and analytical product delivery.
...
Experience working in Agile or product‑oriented delivery environments.
...
Experience in regulated financial services environments.
...
Some experience with statistical learning / econometrics / machine learning.

results.title: PAVAN KUMAR
highlights:
Senior Data Scientist GenAI, Assistant Vice President
...
Senior Data Scientist GenAI at [Citizens](https://www.linkedin.com/company/citizens-bank)
...
I’m an AI/ML Engineer with 5+ yeras hands on experience designing, building, and deploying machine learning and LLM-based solutions that solve real business problems. My background spans predictive modeling, RAG systems, NLP, forecasting, data engineering, and MLOps allowing me to own projects end-to-end from data ingestion to production deployment. I have built RAG pipelines, fine-tuned transformer models, developed forecasting systems, deployed AI microservices, and automated ML workflows using tools like FastAPI, Docker, Kubernetes, MLflow, and GitHub Actions. I enjoy transforming raw, fragmented data into scalable ML pipelines and actionable insights, whether the domain is finance, education, or healthcare. My technical toolkit includes Python, PyTorch, TensorFlow, LangChain, Hugging Face, FAISS, Spark, SQL, AWS, Azure, GCP, and modern DevOps/MLOps practices. I work closely with engineering, product, and data teams to deliver reliable, secure, and cost-efficient AI systems that make an impact. I’m passionate about applying AI to real-world problems, building solutions that scale, and continuously learning new ways to push intelligent automation forward. Always open to connecting with teams working on machine learning, generative AI, and data-driven innovation.
...

highlights:
AI/ML Engineer | Generative AI | Python | LLMs | FastAPI | AWS | Machine Learning
...
AI ML Engineer at [Citizens](https://www.linkedin.com/company/citizens-bank)
...
I am an AI/ML Engineer with around 5+ years of experience in designing and developing scalable machine learning, data engineering, and Generative AI solutions. I specialize in building AI-powered applications using Python, Machine Learning, Large Language Models (LLMs), and cloud technologies. My experience includes developing predictive analytics models, building RESTful APIs using FastAPI and Flask, creating ETL/data processing pipelines, and integrating advanced AI solutions using OpenAI, Anthropic, AWS Bedrock, and Azure OpenAI. I have worked with vector databases such as Pinecone, Weaviate, Qdrant, and Chroma to build high-performance Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems. I am passionate about solving real-world problems with AI and continuously learning emerging technologies in Machine Learning, GenAI, and Cloud Computing. I enjoy collaborating with cross-functional teams and building efficient, scalable, and production-ready solutions. Core Skills: • Python | SQL | FastAPI | Flask | Django • Machine Learning | Deep Learning | Generative AI | LLMs • LangChain | RAG | Prompt Engineering | Vector Databases • TensorFlow | PyTorch | Scikit-learn | PySpark • AWS | Azure | Docker | CI/CD | MLOps I am actively interested in opportunities related to AI/ML Engineering, Generative AI, and Data Engineering where I can contribute to innovative and impactful projects.

results.title: Citizens Financial Group AI Adoption Tracker | Larridin | AI Initiative Tracker
highlights:
Citizens Financial Group is positioned as a leading regional bank in AI adoption through a multi-year digital transformation and strategic 'Reimagining the Bank' initiative[1]. The $219 billion bank has achieved significant technology modernization milestones including moving 750+ applications to the cloud, modernizing 80% of its application footprint, and building a centralized data marketplace[2]. Citizens has deployed AI across multiple business functions including software development (with 20% productivity gains), contact center operations, fraud detection, and payment automation[3]. The bank's AI strategy is led by a cross-functional approach with Chief Data and Analytics Officer Krish Swamy and CIO Michael Ruttledge driving implementation across 47+ AI initiatives[4]. Citizens has expanded its strategic partnership with Infosys to accelerate AI-led transformation and plans to achieve $100M in efficiency savings through its TOP program[5].
...

...
Citizens runs AI Academy training for employees throughout the company and provides specialized academies for software engineering, data engineering, and AI engineering upskilling.

results.title: Ankit D.
highlights:
Vice President - Principal AI Engineer | AI-Driven Solution and Architect
...
Vice President Principle AI Engineer at [Citizens](https://www.linkedin.com/company/citizens-bank)
...
- With 15+ years of experience in Software Development and Leadership, I am a technical visionary specializing in building and scaling secure, high-impact platforms for the financial sector. - I am an expert in System Design, tech stack selection, and transforming giant monolithic legacy systems into robust, cloud-native microservices architectures. - My current focus is on defining the next generation of banking technology by serving as the Principal AI Engineer, leading the strategy and architecture for our Core Banking platform's conversational AI initiatives. This includes: - LLM Orchestration: Architecting the core system on Amazon Bedrock and implementing advanced RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) pipelines to ensure accuracy and compliance. - Decoupling & Tooling: Pioneering the Model Context Protocol (MCP) Server to create a universal, standardized interface for LLM tool-calling, simplifying access to critical data across the enterprise. - I am driven by process improvements, functional optimization, and LEAN initiatives, with a proven track record of 100% successful deliveries from conception to completion. Self-motivated and highly organized, I thrive on handling multiple strategic priorities and meeting tight deadlines.
...
#### Vice President Principle AI Engineer (Current)
...
Design the secure integration layer where the LLM can execute complex actions. This involves building Python-based function calling modules to translate user intent into structured queries against the existing Core Banking GraphQL APIs (for tasks like checking balances, viewing transaction history, and initiating payments). Implement strong technical and content-level security controls, utilizing Amazon Bedrock Guardrails for content filtering and setting fine-grained authorization policies to ensure the chatbot only accesses data (via GraphQL) permitted by the user's role. Design and build the Model Context Protocol (MCP) Server using Typescript as a universal, lightweight gateway between the LLM agent and the core banking platform. Initiated and led the development of a custom Model Context Protocol (MCP)-based GraphQL Explorer, a self-service tool that empowers 18 consuming teams to explore complex GraphQL schemas intuitively, dynamically build optimized queries, and streamline API integration for both human and AI clients. This artifact significantly accelerates time-to-market for new features and simplifies LLM tool-calling implementation.
...

...
management • cross-platform consistency • systems

• guardrails •
...
Over the past several years, we’ve taken on one of the most ambitious technology modernizations in banking: moving the entire bank to the cloud, simplifying hundreds of applications, and building a more agile, scalable foundation for the future. 

We’re also using #AI in practical ways to improve the experience our customers have every day—from cutting account opening time to equipping our teams with tools that help them reach resolutions faster, and that work is delivering real results. 

From the start, though, our focus has been clear: use technology to support our colleagues. We’ve invested heavily in upskilling, through AI academies, badging programs, and hands-on learning, so our teams have the tools and confidence to take full advantage of these new capabilities, helping us build a stronger, more future-ready organization.

highlights:

Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Vice President
...
We are looking for an Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Vice President with a robust background in Generative AI, Machine Learning, enterprise architecture, cloud platforms, and scalable solution design. You will be responsible for designing and implementing AI-enabled solutions that are secure, resilient, compliant, and aligned with enterprise architecture standards. This role requires strong experience in translating business requirements into end-to-end AI solution architectures, including platform integration, governance, observability, and production readiness. The ideal candidate will work across business, engineering, security, data, and risk teams to deliver scalable and responsible AI solutions for enterprise use cases.
...
The team you will be joining plays a vital role in enabling enterprise AI adoption by building secure, scalable, and governance-aligned architecture for Generative AI and Machine Learning solutions. This role is important because it helps ensure AI solutions are designed for production readiness, compliance, interoperability, and long-term business value across the organization.
...
an Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Vice President, you will:
...
• Design end-to-end AI/ML and Generative AI solution architectures for enterprise use cases, including model integration, orchestration, APIs, data flows, and downstream system interactions.
...
• Collaborate with business stakeholders, product teams, data scientists, and engineering teams to convert business problems into scalable technical solutions.
...
• Lead architecture design for multi-cloud and hybrid AI environments, ensuring scalability, resiliency, security, and interoperability.
...
• Ensure solutions comply with Responsible AI, governance, data handling, testing, and risk management requirements.
...
• Drive POCs, architecture assessments, technical reviews, and production onboarding for AI applications and platforms.
...
• Partner with platform, cloud, security, and DevSecOps teams to ensure production readiness, observability, access control, and operational excellence.
...
• Establish reusable design patterns for prompt engineering, RAG, model serving, agentic workflows, and AI service integration where applicable.
...
• Deep hands-on expertise in Generative AI, LLMs, ML systems, RAG, vector databases, prompt design, and AI application integration.
...
• Strong knowledge of cloud platforms such as Azure, AWS, or GCP, including AI/ML services, storage, networking, and security.
...
• Expertise in designing scalable, secure, and resilient enterprise architectures for data- and AI-driven applications.
...
• BS, B-TECH, or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Computer Information Systems, Engineering, or Mathematics.
...
• 10+ years of experience in solution architecture, enterprise application architecture, or AI/ML platform architecture.
...
• Strong understanding of DevSecOps, CI/CD, monitoring, observability, and platform engineering concepts.
...
• Expertise in API architecture, microservices, distributed systems, system integration, and event-driven architectures.
...
• Experience with AI governance, Responsible AI, model risk, compliance, testing, and production controls.
...
• Experience in financial services or other highly regulated industries.
...
• Exposure to agentic AI frameworks, AI gateways, federated AI patterns, and enterprise AI shared services.
...
• Hands-on knowledge of Databricks, Kubernetes, container platforms, and MLOps tooling.
...
• Familiarity with document intelligence, workflow orchestration, and intelligent automation platforms.
...

#### Lead Data Scientist (Machine Learning Center of Excellence)
...
Managing team of high caliber data scientists responsible for developing AI/ML & LLM solutions across the enterprise. Below is a abstract of the key solutions developed to date. o Logistic regression based Fair lending model framework to identify potential biases in lending practices o Domain tuned Information Retrieval (IR) with generative summarization o LLM based classification architecture to disposition customer complaints. o Py-spark based Rare itemset mining to identify anomalous user privileges across internal systems. o Automated framework to predict data transformation logic o LLM based topic modeling with decoder used for naming and summarizing topics

- Working with Risk Modeling COE to develop Spark based architecture and python packages for commercial credit risk models to streamline model development and model deployment activities.

- Developed NLP focused Deep learning framework to identify market risk in unstructured data sources and incorporating non-financial risk data into downstream financial risk modeling processes.
...

...
- Developed framework to model non parametric relationships in text with small training data sets by leveraging pretrained embeddings and transfer learning. These models are leveraged to assess emerging risks where the bank does not have monitoring metrics available.

- SQL

- Model deployment and monitoring

- Strong leadership, communication, and stakeholder management skills
